source_section.title_label_raw: Design Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties Applicability of Design Requirements for New Construction or

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties Applicability of Design Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties Applicability of Design Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties
provisions.text: In addition to the design requirements in Part VII, the requirements of this Chapter apply for any new main building or any addition to an existing main building:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties Applicability of Design Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties
provisions.text: on registered heritage properties that are not located within a heritage conservation district; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties Applicability of Design Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties
provisions.text: located within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties Applicability of Design Requirements for New Construction or Additions on Registered Heritage Properties
provisions.text: If the requirements under Part VII conflict with the requirements of this Chapter, the requirements of this Chapter take precedence. (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24) Design Requirement: Maintenance of Same or Similar Cornice Line Height

sections.title_label_raw: The streetwall height for any new main building or any addition to an

provisions.heading_context_raw: The streetwall height for any new main building or any addition to an
provisions.text: The streetwall height for any new main building or any addition to an existing main building shall be required to be within 2.0 metres of the cornice line height established by the registered heritage building along the same streetline. Design Requirement: Stepbacks for Rooftop Additions

sections.title_label_raw: For any addition that occurs on a rooftop of a registered heritage

provisions.heading_context_raw: For any addition that occurs on a rooftop of a registered heritage
provisions.text: For any addition that occurs on a rooftop of a registered heritage building, any portion of the addition shall be required to be stepped back a minimum of 3.0 metres from the streetwall of the registered heritage building. Design Requirement: Painting of Brick or Masonry

sections.title_label_raw: The painting of exterior brick or masonry walls is prohibited, except

provisions.heading_context_raw: The painting of exterior brick or masonry walls is prohibited, except
provisions.text: The painting of exterior brick or masonry walls is prohibited, except where:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The painting of exterior brick or masonry walls is prohibited, except
provisions.text: it is for commercial signage permitted by this By-law; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The painting of exterior brick or masonry walls is prohibited, except
provisions.text: it is required to reinstate or maintain character-defining elements. Design Requirement: Prohibited Cladding Materials

sections.title_label_raw: The following external cladding materials are prohibited on the

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following external cladding materials are prohibited on the
provisions.text: The following external cladding materials are prohibited on the exterior walls of any main building on a registered heritage property:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following external cladding materials are prohibited on the
The following external cladding materials are prohibited on the
The following external cladding materials are prohibited on the
provisions.text: exterior insulation and finish systems where stucco is applied to rigid insulation;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following external cladding materials are prohibited on the
provisions.text: standing seam or corrugated metal siding; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following external cladding materials are prohibited on the
provisions.text: cinder block. Design Requirement: Awnings and Canopies

sections.title_label_raw: If proposed on a registered heritage building, awnings and canopies

provisions.heading_context_raw: If proposed on a registered heritage building, awnings and canopies
provisions.text: If proposed on a registered heritage building, awnings and canopies shall not:

provisions.heading_context_raw: If proposed on a registered heritage building, awnings and canopies
provisions.text: contain vinyl or high-gloss fabrics; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: If proposed on a registered heritage building, awnings and canopies
